basis: IRIS "command used improperly" ↔ YDB "Invalid command keyword encountered"
IRIS "Divide by zero attempted" ↔ YDB "Attempt to divide by zero"
IRIS "label redefined" ↔ YDB "This label has been previously defined"
IRIS "MAXARRAY" subscript depth ↔ YDB "Maximum number of arguments exceeded" (related capacity errors)
IRIS arithmetic overflow ↔ YDB fractional power; both are math-domain errors but cover different cases
IRIS "NAKED indicator undefined" ↔ YDB "Illegal naked global reference"
IRIS "Routine not found" ↔ YDB "Label referenced but not defined" (related routine-resolution failures)
IRIS "$Select error: no condition true" ↔ YDB "No argument to $SELECT was true"
IRIS "STACK" (argument stack out of room) ↔ YDB "Stack overflow"
IRIS "SUBSCRIPT" ↔ YDB subscript-related errors; multiple candidates
IRIS "UNDEFINED" reference to undefined local/global ↔ YDB "Undefined local variable" (also maps to GVUNDEF for globals; v0.2 picks LVUNDEF as primary)
